# notify_suspend | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ Darwin Notify ](/documentation/darwinnotify)

- [ notify_suspend ](/documentation/DarwinNotify/notify_suspend)

-  notify_suspend 

Function# notify_suspend

iOS 4.0+iPadOS 4.0+Mac Catalyst 13.1+macOS 10.6+tvOSvisionOS 1.0+watchOS 2.0+

```
extern uint32_t notify_suspend(int token);
```

## [ Parameters ](/documentation/DarwinNotify/notify_suspend#parameters)

`token`(Input) notification token

## [Return Value](/documentation/DarwinNotify/notify_suspend#return-value)

Returns status.

## [Discussion](/documentation/DarwinNotify/notify_suspend#Discussion)

Suspend delivery of notifications for a token. Notifications for this token will be pended and coalesced, then delivered following a matching call to notify_resume. Calls to notify_suspend may be nested. Notifications remain suspended until an equal number of calls have been made to notify_resume.
